title: Dungen and Armor
description: Lots of new dungeons and lots of new armor and tools thanks to Tinkers Construct! In this modpack there are many mods that make the game more difficult. The new mobs from the mods make the game much more exciting.
body:
Lots of new dungeons and lots of new armor and tools thanks to Tinkers Construct! In this modpack there are many mods that make the game more difficult. The new mobs from the mods make the game much more exciting.
Link for the mod Dynamic Trees Terralith:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-terralith
